title: JSON Schema Generator
scenario: Generate a JSON schema that defines the structure of a user object. The user object should have the following properties: id, name, email, birthday. The schema should require the id property to be a string and the email property to be a string with a valid email format.
constraints: Must require id to be a string
Must require email to be a string with valid email format
Must include a property definition for name

evaluationCriteria.description: The schema requires the id property to be a string
The schema requires the email property to be a string with valid email format
The schema includes a property definition for name
